name: Roasted Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 small Eggplants, cut into 1/2-inch lengthwise slices
2 large Beefsteak tomatoes, cored and thickly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven's broiler.
2. Place the red bell pepper on a rack 4 inches under the broiler and cook until the skin blackens, about 4 minutes. Turn and continue to cook, turning every 2 or 3 minutes until the pepper is charred all around. Place the pepper in a loosely closed paper bag and set aside for at least 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, mix the olive oil with garlic salt and black pepper. Rub the sliced zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and mushrooms lightly with half the oil. Place under the broiler until browned and tender (about 5 minutes per side).
4. Remove the skin from the bell pepper using your fingers. Take out the stems and seeds. Cut the pepper, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and mushrooms into 1-inch dice.
5. In a saucepan, heat the remaining oil over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook until soft, about 1 minute. Add the cumin, coriander, chili powder, and oregano and cook for another 10 seconds.
6. Add the beans, reserved roasted vegetables, and vegetable cocktail juice to the saucepan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot, making 4 servings.
